title: IWholesome Peppery-Gooey Tagine-Pot White Yam
description: A realistic recipe for a wholesome, peppery-gooey, hangover-cure Norwegian dish featuring white yam in a tagine-pot vessel. This paleo-friendly meal is perfect for a morning or late afternoon snack.
instructions: Peel and chop the white yams into small pieces.
Melt a tablespoon of olive oil in a tagine-pot over medium heat. Add chopped garlic, black peppercorns, bay leaves, salt, and red pepper flakes. Sauté for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Add the white yam pieces to the pot. Cover with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for approximately 30-40 minutes or until the yams are tender and gooey.
Serve hot as a snack or breakfast treat.
